message: fix(btrfs): fail closed on malformed rename target (bd-gcidj)

files.patch:
@@ -696,6 +696,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-gagz","title":"Bitmap CRC: remove or deprecate the wrong compute_bitmap_checksum (XOR-based)","description":"ffs-ondisk/src/ext4.rs has two bitmap checksum functions:
1. ext4_bitmap_checksum (line ~1255): Correct — chains group_number as LE data bytes.
2. compute_bitmap_checksum (line ~1743): WRONG — XORs group_number with csum_seed.

The wrong function is used by verify_bitmap_checksum (line ~1752). The correct function is used by verify_block_bitmap_checksum and verify_inode_bitmap_checksum.

Callers of verify_bitmap_checksum (if any exist outside tests) will get wrong results. Either:
(a) Remove compute_bitmap_checksum and verify_bitmap_checksum entirely if no production code uses them.
(b) Fix compute_bitmap_checksum to use the correct algorithm (chain, not XOR).
(c) At minimum, add a comment explaining the bug and deprecate.

ACCEPTANCE: The XOR-based function is either removed, fixed, or clearly marked as wrong with a deprecation warning.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:07:37.646215670Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:30:23.485150957Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:30:23.484685546Z","close_reason":"Removed compute_bitmap_checksum and verify_bitmap_checksum (XOR-based, wrong). Replaced tests with correct versions. Commit 7f4d6eb.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cleanup","ext4"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gagz","depends_on_id":"bd-plyn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:07:49.449981925Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-gagz","depends_on_id":"bd-sf6w","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:07:50.892759045Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-gall","title":"Clean all workspace clippy warnings to zero","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-22T03:57:22.382702537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T03:57:33.615817416Z","closed_at":"2026-03-22T03:57:33.615167426Z","close_reason":"Cleaned all workspace clippy warnings to zero:

- ffs-core tests: 18 needless_pass_by_ref_mut lints (module-level expect + 7 convenience wrapper fixes)
- ffs-btree: 1 too_many_lines lint on delete_range
- ffs-cli: 8 lints (large_enum_variant, missing Eq, map_unwrap_or, too_many_lines)
Workspace now passes: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Also passes: cargo check --workspace --all-targets + cargo fmt --check --all","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clippy","quality"]}
 {"id":"bd-gbsn","title":"Add btrfs COW tree allocator-failure mutation coverage","description":"Apply testing-fuzzing fallback to the in-memory btrfs COW tree mutation path: add adversarial allocator-failure coverage for split/parent-update failures, harden failed mutations so they do not publish deferred frees for still-reachable nodes, and update conformance/COVERAGE.md with the new mutation coverage evidence.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-18T11:08:10.107075277Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T11:43:23.362206697Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T11:43:23.359737091Z","close_reason":"Completed btrfs COW tree allocator-failure hardening; focused tests, workspace check, workspace clippy, fmt, diff check, and UBS critical scan passed.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs","mutation","testing"]}
+{"id":"bd-gcidj","title":"Fail closed on malformed btrfs rename target lookup","description":"Fresh-eyes btrfs rename finding: btrfs_preflight_rename_target treats every lookup error as target absent, and the mutation path later uses if-let-Ok target lookup. That can turn malformed target DIR_ITEM/lookup corruption into a successful rename instead of failing closed. Distinguish NotFound from lookup corruption and add regression coverage.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"cod-fs","created_at":"2026-04-27T08:03:56.025263558Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T08:12:09.855837052Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T08:12:09.853804211Z","close_reason":"Malformed btrfs rename target lookup now propagates corruption instead of treating it as target absence; added regression proving failed rename leaves source entry intact. Validation passed: focused ffs-core regression, fmt, diff-check, UBS touched file, workspace check, and workspace clippy.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-gdoc","title":"Add chunk tree walking, device tree discovery, and free space item types","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-23T20:04:26.639861082Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-23T20:04:38.630175926Z","closed_at":"2026-03-23T20:04:38.629701428Z","close_reason":"Added:
1. walk_chunk_tree(): builds complete chunk map by walking chunk tree beyond sys_chunk_array
2. parse_chunk_item(): parses individual chunk items from leaf entry data
3. walk_device_tree(): walks device tree for device enumeration
4. Free space item type constants (FREE_SPACE_INFO/EXTENT/BITMAP)
5. DEV_ITEM and CHUNK item type constants
120 ffs-btrfs tests pass. FEATURE_PARITY: 88/88.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs","parity"]}
 {"id":"bd-glsk","title":"Add offset overflow guards in write/fallocate paths","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-01T20:43:02.807152313Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T20:44:45.431230465Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T20:44:45.430855956Z","close_reason":"Already implemented: all four write/fallocate paths (ext4_write, ext4_fallocate, btrfs_write, btrfs_fallocate) already use checked_add for offset+length overflow detection","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
